title: New Automation: When the status of a Subitem change to done move subitem to Item in Group
excerpt:
We need this automation: 
When the status of a Subitem change to something than move subitem to item in group

posts.author: Inga (Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need this automation:
When the status of a Subitem change to something than move subitem to item in group

posts.author: Mayowa-c (Mayowa)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone been able to do this? I’m trying to reference the subitem in an automation but it’s not working

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Mayowa-c, @kmccurry, @Inga

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-10-02 at 15.56.582254×312 22 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000287

Hope that helps!
